query:
SELECT fc.id AS fixedCostId, fc.cnpj_id AS cnpjId, fc.name, fc.amount, fc.createdByUserId, fcp.id AS paymentId, fcp.periodYear, fcp.periodMonth, fcp.amountPaid, fcp.status
FROM fixed_costs fc
LEFT JOIN fixed_cost_payments fcp ON fcp.fixedCostId = fc.id
WHERE fc.id IN (SELECT id FROM fixed_costs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10)
ORDER BY fc.id DESC, fcp.periodYear DESC, fcp.periodMonth DESC;
